name: Elementary Education

sections.label: Iowa Distribution Requirements (C or better)
sections.description: One mathematics course (MTH or STA prefix); one American History course; one lab science in BIO or PHY-114 Modern Astronomy; one social science course (ANT, ECO, POL, PSY, or SOC prefix).

sections.label: K–8 Endorsement Area
sections.description: One K–8 endorsement in: Art, English/Language Arts, French, Spanish, Health, History, Mathematics, Music, Physical Education, Reading, Science, Social Studies, or Speech Communication/Theater.

sections.label: Professional Education Courses (GPA 2.7+, C or better in each)

items.title: Instructional Technology for Teaching and Learning (0.5 cc)
Health Education for the Elementary Teacher (0.5 cc)

notes: GPA of 2.7 or higher and a C or better required in all professional education courses. Iowa licensure program — additional state requirements may apply.
